title: First Year Norwegian 1
catalogDescription: Fundamentals of oral and written Norwegian, including introductory study of literature, film, and other authentic texts. First in a sequence of three. Maximum 15 credits allowed between NORW 101; NORW 102; NORW 103; and NORW 150. Offered: A.
